name: Cashew Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the chicken and other ingredients aside.
2. Prepare the sauce by mixing soy sauce, soybean paste, sugar, rice wine vinegar, and salt well, then set aside.
3. Heat a little oil in a wok or frying pan. Add the chicken pieces and cook until no longer pink.
4. Add minced garlic and cook for a minute or two.
5. Stir in bamboo shoots and green peppers, cooking for another minute.
6. Sprinkle a small amount of rice wine vinegar over the mixture and cook for an additional minute.
7. Add cashews (nuts) and cook for another minute.
8. Pour the sauce over the contents of the wok and stir until heated through.
9. Serve hot over cooked rice with a side dish such as Szechuan Green Beans.
